summary: Comprehensive testing of Growth Economy System APIs. All 71 tests passed (36 unit tests + 35 API integration tests). Mining formula R(U) = max(3, 8 - 0.5 × log₂(U)), Network cap formula min(4000, 800 + 16×D), and Redeem calculations all verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Mining formula R(U) = max(3, 8 - 0.5 × log₂(U)) correctly implemented with min=3, max=8 PRC per user
Network cap formula min(4000, 800 + 16×D) correctly implemented with base=800, increment=16, max=4000
Redeem calculation correctly applies: Burn 5% + Processing ₹10 (converted to PRC) + Admin 20%
Subscription speed multipliers: Explorer=0% (can't mine), Elite PRC=70%, Elite Cash=100%
Growth levels 0-9 based on network size thresholds (10,20,40,80,160,320,640,800,1000) working correctly
seed_data_creation: None - API tests use formula verification without mock users in DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Growth Economy System fully tested with comprehensive API and unit tests. All formulas verified: Mining R(U)=max(3,8-0.5×log₂(U)), NetworkCap=min(4000,800+16×D), Daily=550+U×R(U). Current settings: redeem_percent=70%, burn_rate=5%, processing_fee=₹10, admin_charge=20%, base_mining=550, prc_rate=11.
